zh.document.title: bilikara host
zh.brand.name: bilikara
zh.backup.detected: 检测到上次未完成的点歌列表
zh.backup.restored: 已自动恢复上次歌单，共 {count} 首。
zh.backup.localDetected: 检测到本地备份，共 {count} 首。
zh.service.title: 服务设置
zh.service.autoClearHint: 关闭服务后会自动清空
zh.service.advanceDelayHint: 切歌过渡界面的显示时长
zh.service.dataCleanupHint: 保留已唱归档和抽卡缓存
zh.service.playbackRepairHint: 本地播放出错时重新缓存或重置播放器
zh.service.bbdownLoginTitle: 点击生成 BBDown 登录二维码
zh.service.bbdownLogoutTitle: 点击退出 BBDown 登录
zh.service.noCurrentSong: 当前没有正在播放的歌曲
zh.service.hiresEnabled: 已启用 Hi-Res 音频优先。
zh.service.hiresDisabled: 已关闭 Hi-Res 音频优先。
zh.service.cacheLimitUpdated: 自动缓存窗口已调整为缓存 {count} 首。
zh.service.advanceDelayUpdated: 切歌延迟已调整为 {seconds} 秒。
zh.service.resetDataConfirm: 确认清空 data？会清空当前点歌列表、用户、历史记录和缓存，但保留已唱归档与抽卡缓存。
zh.service.dataCleared: 已清空 data，保留已唱归档和抽卡缓存。
zh.service.retryCurrentStarted: 已重新开始缓存当前歌曲。
zh.service.resetPlayerConfirm: 确认重置播放器状态？会重新载入当前播放器并恢复播放器设置。歌单、历史和缓存不会被清空。
zh.service.switchReleasePrompt: 当前为开发版或非正式版。是否打开 GitHub Releases 下载最新正式版？
zh.service.updateFoundPrompt: 发现新版本。是否打开 GitHub Releases 下载更新？
zh.service.updateTimeout: 连接 GitHub Releases 超时，请稍后重试。
zh.service.updateFailed: 检查更新失败，请稍后重试。
zh.player.fullscreenDisabled: 当前没有可全屏的播放内容
zh.player.fullscreenEnterLabel: 将播放器区域切换为全屏
zh.player.fullscreenUnsupported: 当前环境不支持区域全屏
zh.player.empty: 把 Bilibili 视频链接加入点歌列表后，这里会开始播放。
zh.player.emptyShort: 把 B 站视频链接加入点歌列表后，这里会开始播放。
zh.player.preparingTracks: 当前歌曲正在准备独立音视频轨。
zh.player.avSyncHint: 正数表示画面提前，负数表示画面延后。
zh.player.volumeHint: 直接控制服务端当前本地播放的音量。
zh.player.followingQueueEmpty: 后续点歌列表暂时为空
zh.player.remainingQueue: 还有 {count} 首点歌等待中
zh.remote.heroCopy: 在同一个局域网里，用手机查看当前点歌列表、继续点歌，也可以远程控制正在播放的视频。
zh.remote.miniQrAlt: 手机访问二维码缩略图
zh.remote.defaultHint: 请确保手机和服务端在同一个局域网内。
zh.remote.sameLanHint: 手机和服务端在同一个局域网内时，可直接扫码访问。
zh.remote.noLanHint: 暂未检测到局域网地址，可稍后刷新或手动检查网络。
zh.remote.qrFailed: 二维码生成失败，请稍后重试
zh.remote.qrImageFailed: 二维码加载失败，请复制下方链接到手机访问。
zh.remote.copyUnavailable: 当前没有可复制的手机访问地址。
zh.remote.copyFailed: 复制失败，请手动复制页面中的链接。
zh.remote.controlUnsupported: 当前模式暂不支持远程控制播放。
zh.remote.controlCachePending: 当前歌曲还没有完成本地缓存，暂时无法远程控制。
zh.remote.controlPausedHint: 当前已暂停，可以恢复播放、前后跳转，或直接切歌。
zh.remote.controlPlayingHint: 当前正在播放，可以暂停、前后跳转，或直接切歌。
zh.remote.controlSentToggle: 已发送播放 / 暂停指令。
zh.remote.controlSentForward: 已发送快进 15 秒指令。
zh.remote.controlSentBack: 已发送后退 15 秒指令。
zh.remote.noCurrentSong: 当前还没有正在播放的歌曲
zh.remote.noCurrentHint: 点歌后会进入点歌列表，轮到时由服务端页面播放。
zh.remote.queueViewToggle: 切换点歌列表和历史记录
zh.remote.queueEmpty: 点歌列表暂时是空的，可以继续点下一首歌。
zh.remote.bindingAddingTail: 正在按绑定关系加入点歌列表...
zh.remote.exportingImagePaged: 正在导出{source}图片（每页 {count} 首）...
zh.remote.addUserFirst: 请先让服务端添加用户
zh.remote.queueOrderMessage: 确认将《{title}》移动到第 {index} 首吗？
zh.request.title: 点歌
zh.request.urlPlaceholder: 输入 Bilibili 视频链接、BV 号或 av 号
zh.request.urlRequired: 请输入 B 站视频链接或 BV 号
zh.request.parsing: 正在解析视频信息并加入点歌列表...
zh.request.duplicateHint: 这首歌已经在当前点歌列表中，或本次已经点过，确认后可继续加入。
zh.request.duplicateActiveAndSession: 《{title}》当前点歌列表里已经有了，而且本次已点过 {count} 次，仍要继续点歌吗？
zh.request.duplicateActive: 《{title}》当前点歌列表里已经有了，仍要继续点歌吗？
zh.request.duplicateSession: 《{title}》本次已经点过 {count} 次，仍要继续点歌吗？
zh.session.title: 本场用户
zh.session.help: 点歌会按这里的顺序轮转插入，可以用上下按钮调整顺序。
zh.session.empty: 先添加本场用户，服务端和客户端才能开始点歌。
zh.session.requireUsers: 请先在服务端添加本场 KTV 用户
zh.session.added: 已将 {name} 加入本场 KTV 用户列表。
zh.search.title: 搜索
zh.search.localPlaceholder: 在本地歌曲目录中搜索
zh.search.followPlaceholder: 在这个 UP 的缓存稿件里搜索
zh.search.larkPlaceholder: 在 bilikara 共享数据库中搜索
zh.search.localFound: 搜索到 {count} 条缓存结果。
zh.search.larkSearching: 正在搜索 bilikara 数据库...(联网搜索需要3-15s不等)
zh.search.larkNoResults: bilikara 数据库里没有匹配结果。
zh.search.larkNoResultsLong: bilikara 数据库里没有匹配结果。快使用添加 UID 功能/拉取收藏添加你喜爱的up主/稿件吧
zh.search.larkPartialNoResults: 部分表搜索失败，bilikara 数据库里暂时没有匹配结果。
zh.search.larkFound: 搜索到 {count} 条共享结果。
zh.search.larkFoundPartial: 搜索到 {count} 条共享结果，部分表搜索失败。
zh.search.categoryLoadedMore: 已显示 {count} 条，向下滚动继续加载。
zh.search.browseComingSoon: 这个浏览页还在开发中。
zh.follow.title: 关注列表
zh.follow.noOwners: 还没有可浏览的关注 UID。
zh.follow.noItems: 这个 UP 的缓存稿件里没有匹配结果。
zh.gatcha.title: 试试运气
zh.gatcha.description: 从关注的投稿中随机抽取一首歌曲
zh.gatcha.uidPlaceholder: UID 或 UP 主空间链接
zh.gatcha.busyFallback: 拉取任务执行中，请等待任务结束
zh.gatcha.chooseFavlists: 请选择要拉取的收藏夹。
zh.gatcha.uidResult: {owner} {action}，已拉取{mode}稿件，新增 {added} 条，缓存共 {total} 条。
zh.gatcha.pullingOwnerItems: 正在拉取 UP 主：{name} 的稿件...(稿件较多时可能需要较长时间)
zh.gatcha.drawing: 正在连接 B 站寻找幸运投稿...
zh.gatcha.refreshPartial: 抽卡缓存已部分更新，但有项目拉取失败。
zh.gatcha.confirmPullOwner: 确认拉取 UP 主：{owner} 的{mode}稿件？
zh.gatcha.refreshingBackground: 正在后台更新抽卡缓存...
zh.gatcha.refreshAlreadyRunning: 抽卡缓存已经在更新中。
zh.list.title: 点歌列表
zh.list.emptyHint: 把链接加到左侧输入框里就行。
zh.list.emptyWithCurrentHint: 可以继续从左侧点下一首。
zh.list.clearConfirm: 确定清空点歌列表吗？当前正在播放的歌曲不会受影响。
zh.list.removeConfirm: 确定从点歌列表移除这首歌吗？
zh.list.resorted: 已按本场用户座次重新排序点歌列表。
zh.history.title: 历史记录
zh.history.emptyHint: 点过的歌曲会自动出现在这里。
zh.history.addingFromHistory: 正在从历史记录加入点歌列表...
zh.history.addedNext: 已从历史顶歌到下一首
zh.history.addedTail: 已从历史加入点歌列表
zh.history.clearConfirm: 确定清空历史记录吗？这不会影响当前播放或排队中的歌曲。
zh.history.exportPrompt: 选择导出范围和格式。本场记录是本次启动后已播放的歌曲，全部历史是累计点歌历史。
zh.history.exportPromptWithPageSize: 选择导出范围、图片每页歌曲数和格式。本场记录是本次启动后已播放的歌曲，全部历史是累计点歌历史。
zh.history.exportPageSizeNote: 仅影响图片分页；CSV 会导出完整列表。
zh.binding.title: 选择分P绑定
zh.binding.text: 请选择要下载的视频分P和音频分P。
zh.binding.videoHasParts: 《{title}》包含多个分P，请选择要下载的视频画面和音频轨道。
zh.binding.selectAudioPart: 请至少选择一个音频分P
zh.binding.addedNext: 已按绑定关系顶歌到下一首
zh.binding.addedTail: 已按绑定关系加入点歌列表

zh.favlist.mediaCountSelected: {count} 个稿件 · 命中默认筛选
zh.favlist.searchPlaceholder: 在这个收藏夹的缓存稿件里搜索

zh.favlist.selectAtLeastOne: 请选择至少一个收藏夹

en.document.title: bilikara host
en.brand.name: bilikara
en.backup.restored: Automatically restored previous playlist, total {count} songs.
en.service.title: Settings
en.service.autoClearHint: Will clear automatically after closing the service
en.service.advanceDelayHint: Display duration of the skip transition screen
en.service.dataCleanupHint: Keep played history and gacha cache
en.service.playbackRepairHint: Recache or reset player when local playback errors occur
en.service.bbdownLoginTitle: Click to generate BBDown login QR code
en.service.cacheLimitUpdated: Auto cache limit adjusted to {count} songs.
en.service.resetDataConfirm: Confirm clearing data? This will clear current request list, users, history, and cache, but will retain played archive and gacha cache.
en.service.dataCleared: Data cleared, played archive and gacha cache retained.
en.service.resetPlayerConfirm: Confirm resetting player state? This will reload the current player and restore player settings. Playlist, history, and cache will not be cleared.
en.service.switchReleasePrompt: Currently using a dev or pre-release version. Open GitHub Releases to download the latest stable version?
en.service.updateFoundPrompt: New version found. Open GitHub Releases to download the update?
en.service.updateTimeout: Connection to GitHub Releases timed out, please try again later.
en.service.updateFailed: Failed to check for updates, please try again later.
en.player.fullscreenUnsupported: Regional fullscreen not supported in the current environment
en.player.empty: After adding a Bilibili video link to the request list, it will start playing here.
en.player.emptyShort: After adding a Bilibili video link to the request list, it will start playing here.
en.player.preparingTracks: Currently preparing independent audio and video tracks for the song.
en.player.avSyncHint: Positive values mean video is ahead, negative means video is delayed.
en.player.volumeHint: Directly controls the server's current local playback volume.
en.player.followingQueueEmpty: Following request list is temporarily empty
en.remote.heroCopy: Use your phone on the same LAN to view the queue, request songs, and control the currently playing video.
en.remote.defaultHint: Please ensure the phone and server are on the same LAN.
en.remote.sameLanHint: When the phone and server are on the same LAN, you can access by scanning the code.
en.remote.noLanHint: No LAN address detected yet, please refresh later or manually check network.
en.remote.qrFailed: QR code generation failed, please try again later
en.remote.qrImageFailed: QR code load failed, please copy the link below to access on your phone.
en.remote.copyUnavailable: No mobile access address available to copy right now.
en.remote.copyFailed: Copy failed, please manually copy the link from the page.
en.remote.controlUnsupported: Remote playback control is not supported in the current mode.
en.remote.controlCachePending: This song has not finished local caching yet, so remote control is unavailable.
en.remote.controlPausedHint: Paused. You can resume, seek, or skip to the next song.
en.remote.controlPlayingHint: Playing. You can pause, seek, or skip to the next song.
en.remote.noCurrentHint: Requested songs enter the list and play on the host page when their turn comes.
en.remote.queueViewToggle: Switch between request list and history
en.remote.queueEmpty: The request list is empty for now. You can request the next song.
en.remote.bindingAddingNext: Moving to next with part binding...
en.remote.addUserFirst: Please add a user on the host first
en.request.title: Request Song
en.request.urlPlaceholder: Enter Bilibili video link, BV number, or av number
en.request.urlRequired: Please enter a Bilibili video link or BV number
en.request.parsing: Parsing video info and adding to request list...
en.request.addedTail: Added to the end of request list
en.request.duplicateHint: This song is already in the current request list, or has been requested this session. Confirm to add it anyway.
en.request.duplicateActiveAndSession: «{title}» is already in the current request list, and has been requested {count} times this session. Still want to request?
en.request.duplicateActive: «{title}» is already in the current request list. Still want to request?
en.request.duplicateSession: «{title}» has been requested {count} times this session. Still want to request?
en.session.title: Current Session Users
en.session.help: Requests will be inserted in rotation based on this order. You can use up/down buttons to adjust.
en.session.empty: Add session users first so the server and client can start requesting songs.
en.session.requireUsers: Please add KTV users on the server first
en.session.added: Added {name} to this session's KTV user list.
en.search.title: Search
en.search.followPlaceholder: Search in this Uploader's cached videos
en.search.larkNoResults: No matching results in bilikara database.
en.search.larkNoResultsLong: No matching results in bilikara database. Use Add UID / Pull Favorites to add your favorite uploaders/videos!
en.search.larkPartialNoResults: Partial table search failed, no matching results in bilikara database temporarily.
en.search.larkFoundPartial: Found {count} shared results, partial table search failed.
en.search.browsePickLetter: Choose a letter to browse tags.
en.search.categoryLoadedMore: Showing {count}; scroll down to load more.
en.search.browseComingSoon: This browse view is still being built.
en.follow.title: Follow List
en.follow.noOwners: No follow UIDs available to browse yet.
en.follow.noItems: No matching results in this Uploader's cached videos.
en.gatcha.title: Gatcha
en.gatcha.description: Randomly draw a song from followed uploads
en.gatcha.pullingOwnerItems: Pulling videos for Uploader: {name}... (May take a while for many videos)
en.gatcha.drawing: Connecting to Bilibili for a lucky upload...
en.gatcha.refreshPartial: Gacha cache partially updated, some items failed.
en.list.title: Request List
en.list.emptyHint: Just add a link into the left input box.
en.list.emptyWithCurrentHint: You can continue requesting the next song from the left.
en.list.clearConfirm: Are you sure you want to clear the request list? The currently playing song will not be affected.
en.list.removeConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove this song from the request list?
en.list.resorted: Request list re-sorted by session user order.
en.history.title: History
en.history.emptyHint: Requested songs will automatically appear here.
en.history.addingFromHistory: Adding to request list from history...
en.history.addedNext: Moved to play next from history
en.history.addedTail: Added to request list from history
en.history.clearConfirm: Are you sure you want to clear the history? This won't affect currently playing or queued songs.
en.history.exportPrompt: Select export range and format. Session Record includes songs played after this startup, All History is the cumulative request history.
en.history.exportPromptWithPageSize: Select export range, songs per image page, and format. Session Record includes songs played after this startup, All History is the cumulative request history.
en.history.exportPageSizeNote: Only affects image pagination; CSV exports the full list.
en.confirm.default: Are you sure you want to execute this action?
en.binding.title: Select Part Binding
en.binding.text: Please select the video part and audio part to download.
en.binding.videoHasParts: «{title}» contains multiple parts. Please select the video and audio parts.
en.binding.selectVideoPart: Please select a video part first
en.binding.selectAudioPart: Please select at least one audio part
en.binding.addedNext: Moved to play next based on binding
en.binding.addedTail: Added to request list based on binding
en.favlist.title: Select Favorites
en.favlist.text: Please select public favorites to pull.
en.favlist.searchPlaceholder: Search in this favorite folder's cached videos
en.favlist.noBrowseFolders: No favorite folders available to browse yet.
en.favlist.noItems: No matching results in this favorite folder's cached videos.
en.favlist.chooseForUid: UID {uid} has {count} public favorites. Please select which to add to the gacha pool.
en.favlist.selectAtLeastOne: Please select at least one favorite folder
en.favlist.pullingSelected: Pulling selected public favorites... (May take a while)
